question: When Nvidia reported earnings in May 2026, how much revenue did it forecast for the following quarter?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer: When Nvidia reported its fiscal Q1 2027 earnings on May 20, 2026 (with revenue of $81.6 billion for the quarter), the company forecast revenue of **$91.0 billion, plus or minus 2%**, for the following quarter (Q2 fiscal 2027). Nvidia noted this outlook did not assume any Data Center compute revenue from China, and it also guided GAAP and non-GAAP gross margins of about 74.9% and 75.0%, respectivel

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
Nvidia forecast **$91.0 billion in revenue, plus or minus 2%**, for its second quarter of fiscal 2027. The outlook excluded any data-center compute revenue from China.

Source: [Nvidia Newsroom](https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/nvidia-announces-financial-results-for-first-quarter-fiscal-2027)
